holdings.infoBox: AIPO is an equity ETF with a total of 78 individual holdings. The top holdings are Quanta Services stock at 8.21%, GE Vernova at 7.31%, Vertiv Holdings Co at 7.25%, Eaton Corporation at 7.25%, and OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 5.48%.

overview.description: The Defiance AI & Power Infrastructure ETF (AIPO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index comprised of US-listed companies earning at least 50% of their revenue from AI and power infrastructure, including decentralized energy, grid equipment, data centers, and AI hardware. Holdings span utilities, engineering, and technology-enabling AI driven energy systems AIPO was launched on Jul 24, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
infoTable: MarketVector US Listed AI and Power Infrastructure Index
